name: Black-Eyed Peas and Sausage Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds salt pork, boiled once and cut into small pieces
3 pounds smoked hot sausage, cooked and cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, sauté onions, bell pepper, garlic, and parsley until they are soft.
2. Add the salt pork, sausage, black-eyed peas, and rice to the pan. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Pour in 12 cups of water and stir well.
4. Cover the pan tightly and place it on the lowest heat setting.
5. Cook for 45 minutes without removing the cover.
6. After 45 minutes, remove the cover and let the dish sit for an additional 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
